Meta.title: OSSFIT
Meta.description: Find open source issues that match your stack.

Home.tagline: Discover GitHub issues tailored to your skills.

Beta.title: Beta access
Beta.description: OSSFIT is in a closed beta. Enter the access password you were given.
Beta.errorMissingConfig: The server is missing configuration. Please contact the operator.

Login.title: Sign in with GitHub
Login.description: Sign in with your GitHub account and OSSFIT will recommend issues that match your stack.

Profile.stackEmpty: No stack tags detected yet. Try re-analyzing.
Profile.reanalyzeSuccess: Your skill profile is up to date.
Profile.reanalyzeError: Analysis failed. Please try again later.
Profile.reanalyzeMissingToken: GitHub access token expired. Please sign in again.

Onboarding.title: Onboarding
Onboarding.description: Confirm your stack and domains so we can recommend the right issues.
Onboarding.step1Description: Stack tags detected from your GitHub activity. Click to remove, or add more below.
Onboarding.stackEmpty: No stack detected yet. Add tags below.
Onboarding.step2Description: Select one or more domains you are interested in.

Feed.title: Recommended issues
Feed.total: {count, plural, =0 {No issues} one {# issue} other {# issues}} total
Feed.empty: No issues match the current filters. Try adjusting them.
Feed.emptyNoStack: No stack tags yet, so we can't recommend issues. Add tags from your profile.
Feed.errorRateLimit: GitHub search quota exceeded. Please try again later.
Feed.errorMissingToken: GitHub access token expired. Please sign in again.
Feed.errorUnknown: Failed to load issues. Please try again later.
